params.name: Sitar
params.description:
On May 22, 1960 AD, Sitar master Ravi performed on stage with The Beatles.
The Sitar, India's most iconic musical instrument, is renowned for its intricate playing style. It features seven primary strings and eleven sympathetic strings, with a resonating chamber at the end. Master musicians even craft custom sitars with dual resonators. The instrument's complexity can intimidate even the most seasoned players.
